# Third-party notices

The extension bundles these unmodified ESM distribution files for local, offline runtime use:

| Package | Version | License | Source | Bundled file |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| marked | 18.0.6 | MIT | https://github.com/markedjs/marked | `marked.esm.js` |
| dompurify | 3.4.12 | MPL-2.0 OR Apache-2.0 | https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify | `purify.es.mjs` |

The complete license texts remain available from each package's source repository and installed npm package.
